message:
feat(core): add optional FrankenRedis session integration dependencies

Adds the fr-store, fr-protocol, fr-config, fr-expire, and fr-persist
crates as optional path dependencies pointing to the sibling
frankenredis repository. All five are pinned to exact version =0.1.0
to ensure lock-step compatibility while sourcing from the sibling
source-of-truth repo.

Introduces the "redis-session" feature gate that enables all five
FrankenRedis crates together, allowing session state primitives to be
backed by the FrankenRedis store without affecting builds that don't
need Redis-backed sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
